testcase.name: test_add_question_autofills_family_and_state

failure.message: AssertionError: state auto-fill BUG: expected 'VIC' but got None. Server uses doc.setdefault('state', cat.get('state')) but AdminQuestionBody.state defaults to None and is always present in model_dump(). assert None == 'VIC' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdcc04914cc0>('state') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdcc04914cc0> = {'category_id': 'dkt_vic', 'correct': 1, 'created_at': '2026-05-27T07:39:14.098044+00:00', 'difficulty': 'easy', ...}.get

testcase.failure: E AssertionError: state auto-fill BUG: expected 'VIC' but got None. Server uses doc.setdefault('state', cat.get('state')) but AdminQuestionBody.state defaults to None and is always present in model_dump(). assert None == 'VIC' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdcc04914cc0>('state') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdcc04914cc0> = {'category_id': 'dkt_vic', 'correct': 1, 'created_at': '2026-05-27T07:39:14.098044+00:00', 'difficulty': 'easy', ...}.get
